imageUi.qualityHint: Pro — higher detail, usually more credits.
imageUi.modelHintMain: Turnaround, body, face — model figure and appearance
imageUi.modelHintRequired: Required — only her photos go into generation
imageUi.modelHintOrUpload: Or upload a model photo below
imageUi.identityHintUpload: Face and appearance (like identity ref in workflow)
imageUi.refAnchor: Frame anchor: Grok + WaveSpeed (pose, light, framing)
imageUi.refPose: Pose, background, light — like scene ref in «Model swap»
imageUi.noFaceCrop: Mode: crop without face — model face refs won't go into generation.
imageUi.autoAnalyze: You can «Generate» right away — analysis runs on the server automatically.
imageUi.maskPaint: Draw mask with brush — mark in white what to change on the shot.
imageUi.maskExternal: Brush alternative: fully prepared mask in external editor.
imageUi.promptHintDetail: Pose, place, outfit, light — in detail
imageUi.promptPhExample: e.g. bedroom, standing by window, red dress, soft daylight…
imageUi.pendingArchive: Image is ready but didn't land in Saved. You can save to archive without regenerating.
imageUi.upscalePick: Pick a shot from Saved or generate again
imageUi.toVideoTitle: Open Video tab with this frame
imageUi.downloadIosTitle: On iPhone Share menu opens — save to Photos without leaving the app
imageUi.bootstrapTagline: Two references: hair/face and overlay — base for turnaround sheet.
imageUi.devOutputHintPlain: Dev Vite build + STUDIO_ALLOW_PROMPT_ONLY=true on server only: WaveSpeed is not called; final JSON prompt is shown below.
imageUi.refAnalysisLead: Reference analysis detects which body parts are in frame — prompt and model photos adjust automatically (no extra face/hair instructions).
imageUi.pipelineMain: Pipeline like workflow «By ref»: cabinet model + scene reference (Grok describes frame, WaveSpeed assembles shot).
imageUi.pipelineFaceSwap: Pipeline like workflow «Model swap»: cabinet model or separate identity photo + scene reference with a person.
imageUi.exifHint: When saving frame to archive, model EXIF references (selfie or main camera) or «as from phone» preset are applied.
